promoted_facts.fact: System Services Fee spending breakdown for 2024: $5,326,228 total, equivalent to 2.4% of franchisee GRR. 72% digital marketing, 17% admin, 11% other/SEO.
Franchise system across all ESA brands totals 129 franchised hotels with 13,351 rooms as of 12/31/2024 (per financial statement notes).
Contract termination fees of $2.1M contributed to 'other revenues' in 2024 (vs $0.2M in 2023). These are non-recurring.
Auditor is Deloitte & Touche LLP, Charlotte NC office. Report dated March 24, 2025.
Franchisees currently prohibited from any digital or email marketing. Franchisor conducts all digital/email marketing funded through SSF.
Michigan Franchise Investment Law notice in front matter (pages 5-6) covers good cause termination, fair market value compensation, venue restrictions, transfer conditions.
No periodic accounting of SSF spending provided to franchisees (except Maryland franchisees upon written request).
Affiliate ESA Management received $2,510,895 in 2024 for management services to a limited number of franchisee-owned ESA Suites hotels.
